actionUnits.condition: GameObject has BoxCollider (no Rigidbody). Script Fire (MonoBehaviour; script GUID 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) is attached with scene-serialized fields: isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, onNeighborsThreshold=2, totalHitTime=5, maxHitInterval=2, mainEffectGo -> fileID 1849464941111748095, neighbors empty. No UnityEvent m_Calls are defined on this object, and the Fire script exposes no public parameterless methods; thus no direct event method can be invoked. This Trigger holds interaction time to allow automatic behaviors (neighbor-driven ignition via Update/CheckNeighborState leading to UpdateFireState and particle play/stop) if other systems populate neighbors and/or call FindNeighbors. Note: BoxCollider m_IsTrigger=0; object lacks Rigidbody, so Grab/Transform are not applicable. MonoBehaviour component in the scene corresponds exactly to Fire.cs; settings are taken from the provided scene meta. To cover turning-off logic, external water system must invoke WaterHit(Vector3) repeatedly within maxHitInterval until totalHitTime is reached.
